parsedProfile.rawText:
Aaradhy Singh
Email: aaradhysingh12@gmail.com | Location: Phagwara, Punjab, India
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/aaradhy-singh | GitHub: github.com/Aaradhy-singh

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
AI student specializing in Generative AI, Prompt Engineering, and
Data Analytics. Completed AI learning paths on AWS, Google Cloud,
Microsoft, IBM, and Hugging Face. Developed 200+ prompt portfolio.
Earned 20+ AI and cloud certifications.

EDUCATION
Lovely Professional University, Phagwara, Punjab
Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering
August 2025 – June 2028

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
EAB – Virtual Job Simulation (Forage) | January 2026
Generative AI – Proposal Development
- Drafted university partnership proposals using GenAI tools
- Translated client insights into outcomes-focused proposal content

Tata Group – Virtual Job Simulation (Forage) | August 2025 – January 2026
AI-Powered Data Analytics
- Conducted exploratory data analysis using AI-assisted techniques
- Designed no-code predictive modeling framework for customer
  delinquency risk using GenAI-driven logic
- Proposed AI-driven collections strategy incorporating automation
  and ethical AI principles

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Core Competencies: Prompt Engineering, Generative AI, GenAI Tools,
Data Analytics, Cloud Computing
AI/ML Platforms: ChatGPT, Vertex AI, AWS AI Services, Google Cloud AI,
IBM Watson, Hugging Face
Cloud Platforms: Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform,
Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, Microsoft Azure

KEY PROJECTS
Prompt Engineering Portfolio: Developed 200+ reusable prompt templates
for productivity, coding, and analytics workflows

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Cloud Practitioner, Google Cloud Digital Leader,
Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals, IBM AI Developer,
Hugging Face NLP Certificate

recommendations.title: No Quantified Achievements
recommendations.description: Your resume has fewer than 3 measurable results. Recruiters need numbers to evaluate impact.

causalContext.deficiencyDetails: Only 2 quantified metric(s) detected (target: 3+). Add specific metrics: "Reduced processing time by 40%", "Managed 200+ prompts", "Improved quality across 5 workflows".

projectedImpact.description: No Quantified Achievements → JD Alignment +5 | Role Match +3%

recommendations.title: Professional Summary Needs Strengthening
recommendations.description: Your summary section is very brief. It should immediately communicate your value proposition.

causalContext.deficiencyDetails: Summary area ~34 words (target: 50+). Write 3-4 sentences: your specialization, top 2-3 skills, and one concrete proof point (cert count, project count, or platform experience).

projectedImpact.description: Professional Summary Needs Strengthening → JD Alignment +3 | Role Match +2%

recommendations.title: Bullet Points Lack Specificity
recommendations.description: 3 of your bullet points score 1-2/5 on specificity. Recruiters and interviewers will push back on vague claims.

causalContext.deficiencyDetails: Average specificity score: 2.3/5. Weak bullets: "Earned 20+ AI and cloud certifications....", "Translated client insights into outcomes-focused proposal co..."

projectedImpact.description: Bullet Points Lack Specificity → JD Alignment +3 | Role Match +2%
